text.title: AI Research Tools Selection Map Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Is there a sharp research question with a defined evidence_type?

conclusion.verdict: Brainstorm first to sharpen the question; do not run tool selection yet.
Use Perplexity Pro with recency_filter='year'; reconcile with one peer source.
Use Consensus or Scite for citation graph + study design.

example.trace: research_question=TAM AI tools → evidence_type=market_data → Perplexity Pro + recency=year.
